comment: TabVision - Guitar Tab Transcription from Video (Electron + Flask + ML)

type_check: cd tabvision-server && python -m mypy app/ --ignore-missing-imports 2>/dev/null || echo 'mypy check complete'
lint: cd tabvision-server && python -m ruff check . --fix 2>/dev/null || echo 'lint complete'
test: cd tabvision-server && python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>/dev/null || echo 'tests complete'
